category_sources: Official Geth site describes go-ethereum as an Ethereum execution client and gateway into the decentralized web.
source_facts.description identifies the package as the official Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables includes geth as the primary executable.
source_facts.homepage is geth.ethereum.org; official site names the project Geth/go-ethereum.
docs_sources: Official Geth website has a dedicated /docs documentation path for go-ethereum.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Geth documentation describes Geth as an Ethereum client used to run a node.
source_facts.description supports Ethereum, Go implementation, and protocol tags.
